title: Get all status values in a specific status column?
excerpt: Hi - Is there a way to query the v2 api for all existing status values in a specific status column?

posts.author: kitmackie (Kit Mackie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - Is there a way to query the v2 api for all existing status values in a specific status column?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kit!

Try querying the settings_str of a status column. It will return the columns configuration which, in this case, is all the labels in the status.

Let me know if that helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
